digest.greeting: Jean, the dashboard state shows the day moved forward on Camilo's corrected leave request, Phase 2 SMS approvals/UAT, the EPMO portal review, and the BCP/IR portfolio follow-through. The remaining carry-forward is tighter for Monday: Mid-Year Touchpoints, executive-deck cleanup, Lead Up pre-work, and the two new reminders that landed late today.

items.label: Approved Camilo's corrected leave request
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260612-approve-camilo-corrected-leave complete after the morning digest flagged the corrected June 17-25 vacation request as the active Rippling approval item.

items.label: Advanced Phase 2 SMS approvals and UAT ownership
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260612-advance-phase-2-sms-approvals-uat complete after the morning digest captured the updated scope, Legal and Marketing approval path, June 16 Marketing due date, and provisional Jessica/Craig tester assignment.

items.label: Reviewed the EPMO portal
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260612-revisar-epmo-portal complete after it appeared as the active one-shot reminder in the morning digest.

items.label: Closed the BCP/IR and portfolio 1:1 follow-through
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260611-prepare-bcp-ir-and-portfolio-1-1s complete after it carried forward from Thursday into today's EPMO and executive-status prep.

items.label: Submit Mid-Year Touchpoints by Monday
items.detail: HR's June 11 email asks Jean to submit Mid-Year Touchpoints in Rippling for Camilo Vejarano, Andrea Rodriguez, David Molano, and Mar Garcia by Monday, June 15, including KPIs and competencies. Dashboard state does not mark this task complete.

items.label: Finish EPMO EOW and executive deck follow-through
items.detail: The morning digest tied today's EPMO EOW Check In and Executive Project Status Slide Update to Phase 2 SMS state, Nadia/Steering Committee implications, and any BCP/IR carry-over that needed executive-facing status. This task is not marked complete in dashboard state.

items.label: Plan Lead Up Module 2 pre-work
items.detail: Rippling enrolled Jean in Lead up Module 2 Pre Work with a due date of June 25 at 8:06 AM. The morning digest treated this as a planning item for next week, and dashboard state does not mark it complete.

items.label: Check the Weekly Executive Project Updates thread
items.detail: The morning digest surfaced recent activity tied to today's executive deck work and noted a technical-access troubleshooting exchange. Dashboard state does not mark this review complete.

items.label: Follow up with HR on survey results
items.detail: Active dashboard reminder added June 12: "Hacer follow up con HR para resultados de la survey." No completion signal is present in dashboard state.

items.label: Reply on the Venn issues thread for Eugenia and Danny
items.detail: Active dashboard reminder added June 12 asks Jean to respond to Eugenia's email for Danny about Venn problems. Outlook also shows Nadia replied at 5:01 PM with additional Venn pain points including slowness, access problems, app compatibility, Teams issues, and failed authentication.

items.label: Approve Timecards & Prepare for the Week
items.detail: Monday starts with a one-hour prep block. Use it to confirm any remaining Mid-Year Touchpoint submissions due that same day.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: Short Yuri touchpoint. Good place to close Staff Aug or TRACE follow-ups left from Friday.

items.label: 1:1 Shelley & Jean
items.detail: Outlook says the purpose is to understand department needs and how Jean can support. Relevant if Phase 2 SMS, USCIS Interviews, or Bonafide EAD scope needs Shelley input.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected space before EPMO Portfolio Review. Best used for any remaining Rippling, Phase 2, HR survey, or Venn follow-up cleanup.

items.label: EPMO Portfolio Review
items.detail: Sara's portfolio review focuses on new project requests, EPMO classification, missing info, ownership, and rejection communication. Bring any Phase 2 or CoE intake items that need portfolio-level routing.

items.label: Touchpoint w/Jean
items.detail: Outlook shows a 30-minute touchpoint with Licelot Perez about process and quality-assurance requirements inside the EPMO.

items.label: HR survey-results follow-up
items.detail: Active dashboard reminder from Friday: follow up with HR for the survey results.

items.label: Venn follow-up for Eugenia and Danny
items.detail: Active dashboard reminder from Friday: respond to Eugenia's email for Danny about Venn issues.
